{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ancestor’s Spear
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Ancestor’s Spear Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is a significant weapon belonging to the [[Jai clan]], characterized by its glowing white shaft etched with various lines of script. According to clan legends, the original Matriarch used this tool to siphon power from her enemies. In practice, the weapon allows a user to absorb [[madra]] from others, though using it to drain opponents can be dangerous and may require experimentation on captives first. [[Jai Long]] has utilized the spear to accelerate his progression in power, though he lacks formal training in its use. The weapon is highly valued for its ability to influence combat outcomes, potentially serving as the deciding factor between survival and defeat. During a confrontation, the spear was destroyed by [[Blackflame]], reducing the shaft to white dust and leaving behind only the glinting spearhead. Despite its destruction, small shards of the weapon remain.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Ancestor’s [[Spear]] is a shining white weapon housed within a long wooden case. Originally used by the first Matriarch of the [[Jai clan]] to steal the power of her enemies, the weapon possesses the ability to steal and process [[madra]]. While it serves as a factor in the clan's capacity to withstand attacks, it cannot assist a practitioner in advancing to the [[Underlord]] stage. Though [[Jai Long]] carries the case and did not utilize the weapon during his recent confrontation, it remains a tool held by the [[Jai Patriarch]]. Sacred artists use this ancestral weapon to gain power, as seen when [[Jai Daishou]] wields it.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor’s Spear]] can steal and process [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor’s Spear]] is a shining white weapon kept in a long wooden case.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The original Matriarch of the [[Jai clan]] used the [[Ancestor’s Spear]] to steal the power of her foes.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor’s Spear]] is a factor in the [[Jai clan]]'s ability to withstand attacks.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] carries the case for the [[Ancestor's Spear]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] did not use the [[Ancestor’s Spear]] in his recent confrontation.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor’s Spear]] is a weapon held by the [[Jai Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor’s Spear]] cannot help a practitioner advance to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses the spear of his honored ancestor.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor’s Spear]] is used by [[sacred artists]] to gain power.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] takes the head of the [[Ancestor’s Spear]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
